summary: Cherry-picked from #670, this PR cleaned up C/header syntax so the codebase remained usable for context generation while preserving MWERKS-specific behavior where needed. The main pattern was to hide compiler-only constructs such as __declspec(section ".init"), address-qualified declarations, and unknown-size arrays behind cross-tool macros in Runtime/platform.h, then apply those macros across startup/runtime/TRK headers. It also moved FILE/__file_modes structure definitions into stdio.h, trimmed duplicate or misplaced declarations from wchar_io and GX unknown headers, added small GX public headers/prototypes, and standardized fighter action enums to start character-specific IDs at ASID_MAX instead of redefining AS_FTCOMMON = 340 in each character header.

key_files.why: Introduced SECTION_INIT and UNK_SIZE_ARRAY and changed AT_ADDRESS to suppress MWERKS-only syntax under M2CTX.
Replaced inline address and init-section syntax with AT_ADDRESS and SECTION_INIT for Pad3Button, startup functions, and linker-provided arrays.
Converted memset, __fill_mem, and memcpy init-section declarations to the new SECTION_INIT macro.
Converted TRK_memcpy and TRK_memset init-section declarations to SECTION_INIT.
Converted _eti_init_info_ extern declaration to SECTION_INIT while keeping the existing linker-name HACK comment.
Replaced placeholder FILE layout with named __file_modes and struct FILE fields used by MSL/wchar_io.
Removed duplicate FILE, wchar_t, and __file_modes definitions and included common_structs.h instead.
Removed address comments from extern declarations and moved several GX declarations to more specific headers.
Added proper GX headers and changed asm function signatures from unk_t/no-args to typed prototypes for GXInit and __GXInitGX.
New small public header declaring GXCallDisplayList.
New small public header declaring GXSetFieldMode.
One of several character headers changed from a local AS_FTCOMMON = 340 enum entry to first character-specific action = ASID_MAX.

what_changed: Added SECTION_INIT in Runtime/platform.h, expanding to __declspec(section ".init") only for __MWERKS__ when not building M2CTX; otherwise it expands empty.
Changed AT_ADDRESS so MWERKS address-colon syntax is not emitted when M2CTX is defined, while PERMUTER still uses FIXEDADDR.
Added UNK_SIZE_ARRAY in Runtime/platform.h, using [] for MWERKS outside M2CTX and [0] otherwise.

Replaced repeated #ifdef MWERKS_GEKKO / __declspec(section ".init") declaration blocks with SECTION_INIT in Runtime/__mem.h, Runtime/__init_cpp_exceptions.c, MetroTRK/mem_TRK.h, and dolphin/os/init/__start.h.
Replaced raw address-qualified declarations such as extern vu32 __AIRegs[8] : 0xCC006C00 and Pad3Button : PAD3_BUTTON_ADDR with AT_ADDRESS(...) forms.
Moved the detailed FILE layout and __file_modes definition into src/stdio.h, and removed duplicate definitions from MSL/wchar_io.h.
Removed the stray sprintf declaration from MSL.h; stdio.h remains the home for stdio declarations.
Added #include <stdio.h> to MSL/wchar_io.c so fwide has FILE from the proper header.
Marked common_structs.h with a file-level todo: Delete this.
Added Dolphin GX headers GXDisplayList.h and GXPixel.h for GXCallDisplayList and GXSetFieldMode declarations.

Moved or exposed GX transform/pixel/display-list declarations through more specific headers, including GXLoadTexMtxImm, GXSetCurrentMtx, GXLoadNrmMtxImm, GXLoadPosMtxImm, GXSetScissor, GXSetScissorBoxOffset, and GXSetFieldMode.
Simplified GX_unknown_001.h declarations by removing address comments and deleting declarations that were moved elsewhere.
Typed GXInit assembly as asm GXFifoObj* GXInit(GXFifoObj* fifo, u32 size) instead of asm unk_t GXInit(), and made __GXInitGX static void.
Typed GXSetFieldMode assembly as asm void GXSetFieldMode(s8, s32) instead of asm unk_t GXSetFieldMode().

Added ASID_MAX to ftCommonAction and updated Captain, Fox, GameWatch, Luigi, Mario, Mewtwo, and Ness action enums so their first character-specific action equals ASID_MAX rather than carrying a duplicate AS_FTCOMMON = 340 enumerator.
Removed an M2CTX guard around declarations in melee/lb/lbunknown_001.h, making those prototypes visible in context builds.
Minor include cleanup in ftparts.c: added GXTransform.h and os.h explicitly and changed MAX_FT_PARTS from parenthesized macro value to plain 140.
smart_moves: Centralized toolchain syntax differences in Runtime/platform.h instead of scattering M2CTX conditionals through many headers.
SECTION_INIT preserves the MWERKS section attribute for real builds while making declarations parseable for m2ctx and non-MWERKS tools.
AT_ADDRESS abstracts the unusual MWERKS address placement syntax, allowing the same declaration to satisfy PERMUTER, MWERKS, and context-generation modes.
Moving FILE to stdio.h reduced duplicate standard-library struct definitions and made MSL/wchar_io.c include the canonical source of FILE.
Using ASID_MAX as the boundary between common and character-specific fighter actions avoids hard-coded 340 repetition across individual character headers.
Splitting GX prototypes into more specific headers is safer for context generation than accumulating unrelated extern declarations in GX_unknown_001.h.
Adding real prototypes to asm functions improves header/source consistency without attempting to rewrite the assembly bodies.
decomp_lessons: If a declaration needs MWERKS-only syntax, wrap that syntax in a macro that is explicitly disabled for M2CTX rather than using multiline preprocessor fragments in the middle of declarations.
Address-bound globals should use AT_ADDRESS(...) instead of raw `: address` syntax so context tooling does not have to parse MWERKS extensions.
Init-section functions and externs should use SECTION_INIT; this keeps section placement information in matching builds while keeping headers C-parser friendly.
Avoid duplicating standard library structs in feature headers; define FILE-related layout in stdio.h and include it where needed.
For fighter action-state enums, prefer a shared sentinel such as ASID_MAX to repeated magic constants and duplicate enum names.
Header cleanup can be a matching enabler: cleaner prototypes and includes make generated contexts more stable even when no C function is newly matched.
When adding typed signatures to inline assembly functions, align the .c asm signature with the public header prototype to reduce context and compiler disagreement.
Large catch-all unknown headers are useful early, but declarations should migrate to subsystem headers as names and ownership become clearer.
naming_conventions: Use all-caps macro names for toolchain abstraction helpers: SECTION_INIT, AT_ADDRESS, UNK_SIZE_ARRAY.
Use ASID_MAX as the end-of-common-action sentinel for ftCommonAction and initialize character-specific action enums from it.
Use Dolphin-style subsystem header names for GX public declarations, e.g. GXDisplayList.h, GXPixel.h, GXTransform.h, GXInit.h.
Keep internal GX names with double-underscore prefixes when already internal, e.g. __GXInitGX and __GX_unknown_001.h.

Use named FILE fields from the MSL layout such as open_mode, file_orientation, buffer_ptr, read_proc, write_proc, and next_file_struct instead of placeholder unk/filler fields when evidence supports the layout.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Changed asm function declarations from generic unk_t/no-argument forms to concrete signatures for GXInit, __GXInitGX, and GXSetFieldMode while leaving assembly bodies intact.
Used SECTION_INIT to keep functions and linker-provided objects in the .init section for MWERKS matching builds without breaking M2CTX parsing.
Used AT_ADDRESS for fixed hardware/register symbols such as __AIRegs and Pad3Button so fixed-address semantics remain available without raw extension syntax.
Added exact includes in GXInit.c and ftparts.c so prototypes come from headers instead of local or unknown declarations.

Removed address comments from GX_unknown_001.h declarations; these comments may have been useful as breadcrumbs, but the diff's purpose was syntax/context cleanliness rather than preserving address annotations in that header.

review_feedback.note: No inline review comments or issue comments were present in the provided PR slice; reviewer rationale is not evidenced beyond approval.

follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that replace common_structs.h or complete the todo to delete it.
Search for remaining raw `__declspec(section ".init")` declarations not converted to SECTION_INIT.
Search for remaining raw MWERKS address declarations using `: 0x` or `: SOME_ADDR` instead of AT_ADDRESS.
Audit other fighter action enums for AS_FTCOMMON or hard-coded 340 after ASID_MAX was introduced.
Find subsequent GX header cleanup that moves declarations out of GX_unknown_001.h into subsystem headers.
Look for uses of UNK_SIZE_ARRAY introduced by this PR to understand the intended unknown-size array pattern.
